svg.title: Tokenix – token transfer architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing five components: User, Frontend, Backend, Database, and Blockchain layer, with labeled arrows showing the secure token transfer flow.
svg.text: client boundary — private key never leaves
1 User initiates transfer → Frontend signs locally (private key stays on client)
2 Frontend sends signed payload → Backend verifies signature → calls BlockchainClient
3 Contract executes → txHash returned → Backend stores PENDING → updates to CONFIRMED
4 Frontend polls for status update → balance and history refreshed
